heading: Output
body:
[killOp](manual/reference/command/killOp) returns the following
if it succeeds in marking the specified operation for termination:

```
{ "info" : "attempting to kill op", "ok" : 1 }
```

Note that the output is the same whether or not the operation being
terminated is currently running. You can use [$currentOp](determine-query-status) to verify that the operation was terminated.
